title: Fox News Tops March And Q1 Ratings, But News Network Audiences Continue To Drop Versus 2022; CNN Sees Steep Primetime Decline
text: Fox News topped March ratings, but all of the major news networks saw double digit erosion from the same month in 2022. CNN saw some of the steepest declines, with it primetime audience down 61% from March of 2022, and dropping 73% in the 25-54 demo.

text: Peter Lynch, one of the most successful and well-known investors of all time, once said, “Insiders might sell their shares for any number of reasons, but they buy them for only one:they think the price will rise.

title: Buy Fox for Its TV Reach. Hold It for Tubi's Growth.
text: Fox's sports and news programming are some of cable TV's biggest draws. Fox's unique entry in the streaming space is growing rapidly and could double its current annual revenue within the next five years.

title: Fox Unveils Major Expansion Of Century City Studio Lot With 9 New Soundstages, Media Campus
text: Fox Corp. is planning a major building overhaul and expansion of its Century City lot including nine new soundstages as well as a media campus, office space and focus on related transportation infrastructure.

title: 5 Best and Worst Performing Communication Services Stocks in February 2023
text: The communication services sector includes companies that offer communication services using fixed-line networks and those that offer wireless access and services.
